title: [MTR3/4]Srt European Continental Trains
description: This Resource Pack adds Continental European Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![srteuro display image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b92ea34e16a2e88183b9beffe15ff95d1e4381cb_0.webp)

## Srt European Continental Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway

## Introduction
This resource pack adds Continental European trains for Minecraft Transit Railway Mod

This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway** Mod (MTR3, MTR4) and Nemo's Transit Expansion for MTR3 (NTE)

**(Version 1.3) By default, only base version is downloaded, so users must choose pack version from the pack version page and download additional components from the bottom.**

![guide1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8ff4e18bed7ad952dc34ae0ee56e5bfd5c58bca.png)

![guide2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd1a5550d1c0182517b952436b8112dda4e7c292.png)

## Terms & Disclaimer

This RP can be applied manually in the 'Resource Packs' page in the same way that other RPs are applied after Installing Required Mods and Addons.

Before using, please set the JVM arguments to 6GB or higher. It may take some time to load this RP.

MTR3 and MTR4 use different versions, and for MTR3, it is recommended to make 5-6 car or longer except class 628 train (appropriate number of the cars are informed in Spreadsheet - could be found at wiki link)

for more information, check readme inside the pack.

## Contents

* Base pack: Sounds, gangway base files, readme
* German: Class 628, DB Eurofima, DB Eurorunner
* Western Europe: SNCF 22000, Orient Express carriage, SNCF & Renfe eurofima
* Central Europe: OBB & Nightjet Eurofima, OBB Eurorunner, CD Eurofima, MAV Eurofima
* Switzerland: RE460, SBB Eurofima, BLS Carriage
* Eastern Europe: UZ HRCS2, CFR & UZ & RZD Eurofima

(Renfe carriage - compatible with [Non Standard Gauge Rail RP ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr1067mm_rail) broad gauge)
